name: D-Limonene

name: Decyl Glucoside
description: Decyl glucoside is a nonionic surfactant widely used in natural products. It is used most of the time as a co-surfactant with Coco Betaine (amphoteric surfactant) and Coco Glucoside (nonionic surfactant). Not very aggressive, it is made from sugar and coconut. It is suitable for the most sensitive skin like baby's. It is authorized in organic.

As it is biodegradable, this chemical does not pose a problem for the environment, and the health risks remain quite low. Note, however, that the compound is prohibited in aerosol type sprays. Dehydroacetic acid is authorized in Bio.

DHA induces a coloration of the upper layers of the skin by reacting with the amino acids, and this happens without the sun and without risk to health.

Aside from its less-than-virtuous chemical transformation, the ingredient is considered biodegradable (soluble) and poses no known problems once released into the environment.

name: Dimethiconol
description: Dimethiconol is known to create a subtle shine, smooth and silky to the touch. It gives a "bounced" appearance to the skin temporarily, which allows it to fill imperfections and small wrinkles. Compared to other silicones, it is known to have a fluid texture and less oily, which facilitates its spread on the skin. Dimethiconol does not pose a health problem: the CIR has given it a score of 1 in 10 in terms of risk (1 representing the best of the ratings). Dimethethiconol is a large molecule that does not penetrate the skin, and is often used with Cyclopentasiloxane for better diffusion. Like all silicones, it is not very biodegradable. It is forbidden in organic.
common_product_types: Care for dry and damaged hair (23.11%)
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Dimethyl Glycyrrhizinate
description: Dimethyl Glycyrrhizate is a derivative of glycyrrhizic acid, itself derived from licorice root (Glycyrrhiza glabra). This salt is used in cosmetics for its soothing and skin-conditioning properties.This ingredient is not listed in the European INCI database (Cosing), but it is nevertheless used in cosmetics in Europe.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Dimethyl Oxazolidine

name: Dimethyl Ether
description: Produced by the dehydration of methanol, dimethyl ether is a colorless gas mainly used as a propellant in cosmetics, and in particular in hairsprays and hair spray.Attention, this gas should not come into contact with the eyes, and not be breathed: which seems difficult given its use in cosmetics spray.Note that it is used with propane to effectively remove warts.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Dimethicone
description: Dimethicone also called PDMS is a silicone that is not subject to any European restrictions. It is also the most used silicone in cosmetics. Its role is to produce a film of surface around the hair and on the skin, to protect them then (occlusive effect, with what that can imply). It also brings sweetness to the products and makes it easy to use creams and shampoos. It is a little "the Swiss knife of the chemist": it is used a little in all sauces, to make the products brighter, more pleasant and therefore more sellers, or to compensate for the drying effect of certain ingredients like surfactants.This inert component poses no problem for human health, one can only wonder if its effect is not only marketing and artificial. It is on the ecological aspect that the ingredient can have a very negative impact since it is very little biodegradable.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Disodium Cocoamphodiacetate
description: Disodium cocoamphodiacetate is an amphoteric surfactant commonly used in personal care products. It is a mild foaming agent. It increases the foaming power of a solution by increasing the surface viscosity of the liquid that surrounds the individual bubbles in a foam. It is authorized in organic products.

name: Disodium Edta
description: EDTA (EDTA and its main salts used in Disodium EDTA cosmetics, Tetrasodium EDTA, Trisodium EDTA) is a chelating agent that has been used since the 1930s and for which industrialists have complete control of processing and use. Its main property is to complex heavy metals. That is to say, it will somehow neutralize them by forming with them a complex, then serve them as carriers and evacuate them. It is therefore quite logically used in medicine to fight against heavy metal poisoning (lead for example).It is often used as a sequestrant (calcium, limestone ...) in soaps or shower gels, this allows to manage the "hard" water.The ingredient does not pose a problem for human health but its impact on the environment is disastrous: it is not biodegradable and is extremely harmful to nature. The sewage treatment plants do not hold him back and let him run into our rivers! Charcoal filters in our drinking water are not more effective at stopping it (so we are re-treating EDTA / Iron complexes). The problem is finally that he carries with him heavy metals, whose final destination is unknown.EDTA and its salts are banned in organic.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

description: Disodium Phenyl Dibenzimidazole Tetrasulfonate is a chemical UV filter authorized by European cosmetics regulations. It provides protection from UVA rays. Due to its production method, the ingredient is associated with an orange flower on our app.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Disodium Phosphate
description: Disodium Phosphate is a synthetic ingredient, it is used as a laxative. It is also used in the manufacture of enamel and ceramics for dentists. In cosmetics, it is used for its descaling and masking properties.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Disperse Violet 1
description: Disperse Violet 1 — косметический ингредиент.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Disodium Pyrophosphate
description: The disodium pyrophosphate is in the form of a white crystalline powder. In cosmetics, it is used as a buffering agent, chelator and anti-corrosive.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Distarch Phosphate Acetate
description: Distarch Phosphate Acetate — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Vegetal.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Disteardimonium Hectorite
description: Disteardimonium Hectorite is a quaternary ammonium used in cosmetics and personal care products. It is a highly effective stabilizer and viscosity control agent in cosmetics. It is used in deodorants and antiperspirants spray, to improve dispersion and prevent the heaviest ingredients from falling to the bottom of the bottle. It is also widely used in foundations (1 of 3). It is forbidden in organic.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Distearoylethyl Hydroxyethylmonium Methosulfate
description: Distearoylethyl Hydroxyethylmonium Methosulfate — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
common_product_types: Care for dry and damaged hair (5.36%)
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Disodium Stearoyl Glutamate
description: Disodium Stearoyl Glutamate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Dmdm Hydantoin
description: DMDM Hydantoin is used as a preservative in cosmetics and acts against fungi, yeasts and bacteria. It is a liberator of formaldehyde (formol). It is used in shampoos, skin care products, hair products, makeup, conditioners and make-up removers. It is also found in many other consumer products such as herbicides, latex paints, polishes, stripping oils, adhesives, photocopy paper or inks.A formaldehyde liberator is a compound that slowly releases formaldehyde (formol), a molecule considered to be CMR.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Dodecane
description: Dodecane is an oily liquid derived from vegetable oils. It is used as an antioxidant and emollient in cosmetics. It is found in many moisturizers.
